payload.compiled_summary: Dakota: review Probe Dakota through artifact://environment-spec/eng_dakota_docker, Confirm the current Phase 2 gate state for Dakota. Checklist Dakota pack links to the intended environment spec(s), Dakota adapter and evidence bundle reference the same runtime verification report, Dakota anti-patterns and failure signatures match the module class and runtime path. Watch anti-patterns Using Dakota for using dakota as a substitute for unrelated workflows outside optimization, uq, and numerical-backbone workflows., Skipping the linked health check and provenance capture for artifact://environment-spec/eng_dakota_docker., Crossing the adapter boundary for Dakota without a typed contract tied to dakota executable workflows for optimization, uq, and numerical-backbone workflows.. Healthcheck commands python scripts/verify_knowledge_runtime.py --environment-ref artifact://environment-spec/eng_dakota_docker. Runtime eng-dakota/docker_image at birtha/knowledge-eng-dakota:1.0.0; environment ref artifact://environment-spec/eng_dakota_docker; healthcheck commands python scripts/verify_knowledge_runtime.py --environment-ref artifact://environment-spec/eng_dakota_docker; verification refs artifact://verification-report/d1d7536b-86ed-58c0-8e30-78617b778a25. Runtime gate: Healthcheck failed for artifact://environment-spec/eng_dakota_docker: docker: Error response from daemon: failed to create task for container: failed to create shim task: OCI runtime create failed: runc create failed: unable to start container process: error during container init: exec: "python": executable file not found in $PATH.
